description: Evolve is a incrimental game that already exists. Its pretty fun lol

v0.1.0.description:
### Evolve Incremental v0.1.0

The first official release of the [Evolve Client](https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve/) and [APWorld](https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld) is exist!

View the [Info](https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld/blob/main/evolve/docs/en_Evolve.md), [Setup](https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld/blob/main/evolve/docs/setup_en.md) or the main [Github](https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld) pages for more information!

Please, please report any bugs to the APWorld Github Page!

## What's New?
- First Official Release!
- Future **Release Notes** will include an actuall changelog.
- This one doesn't need one because you can go to the Info Page to see what changed since not existing.

## What will *probably* happend next?
- Certain Tech Tree Unlocks will be Items.
   - Oil Derrick
   - Mad Science
   - Mutual Destruction
   - more that i cant remember
- Make Death Link work...
- whatever yall suggest! (if its reasonable)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/The1stBurb/EvolveAPWorld/commits/v0.1.0
v0.1.0.title: First Official Release (v0.1.0)

v0.1.4.description:
# Evolve Incremental v0.1.4

[client](<https://github.com/the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)

### Do I need to redownload the APWorld?

Nope!

## APWorld
- Changed simple file stuff, this shouldn't have any effect! - v0.1.3
- Added a template yaml... - v0.1.4


## Client
- Added links to the Setup and Info pages at the bottom! - v0.1.1
- Fixed it so that you can't just buy an infinite amount of the AP buildings... - v0.1.2
- Changed simple file stuff, this shouldn't have any effect! - v0.1.3

v0.2.6.description:
# Evolve Incremental v0.2.6 [client]() | [apworld]() ### Do I need to redownload the APWold? Nope! ## APWorld - Nothing changed here! ## Client - Fixed being able to purchase infinite AP buildings... - v0.1.5 - Fixed usernames with spaces breaking - v0.1.6 - From now on if your username includes a space, wrap it in quotation marks (") when logging in! - Added Death Link! - v0.2.6


--- ## Death Link Overview #### Cause Death Link will trigger when: - Any amount of soldiers die - From being attacked or attacking - Any amount of citizens die - A spy is executed - A citizen dies in a brawl If multiple deaths happen at once, you attack and 7 soldiers die, Death Link will trigger once. #### Effect Death Link will: - Soldier Pop set to 0 - Citizen Pop set to 1 - Default Job and Citizen set to the job that supplies food. This is to ensure a death spiral doesn't happen where the game is trying to refill other jobs and no food is being produced and everyone dies.

v0.2.6r2.description:
# Evolve Incremental v0.2.6 [client]() | [apworld]() ### Do I need to redownload the APWold? Yes! ## APWorld - Nothing changed here! ## Client - Fixed being able to purchase infinite AP buildings... - v0.1.5 - Fixed usernames with spaces breaking - v0.1.6 - From now on if your username includes a space, wrap it in quotation marks (") when logging in! - Added Death Link! - v0.2.6


--- ## Death Link Overview #### Cause Death Link will trigger when: - Any amount of soldiers die - From being attacked or attacking - Any amount of citizens die - A spy is executed - A citizen dies in a brawl If multiple deaths happen at once, you attack and 7 soldiers die, Death Link will trigger once. #### Effect Death Link will: - Soldier Pop set to 0 - Citizen Pop set to 1 - Default Job and Citizen set to the job that supplies food. This is to ensure a death spiral doesn't happen where the game is trying to refill other jobs and no food is being produced and everyone dies.

v0.3.14.description:
# Evolve Incremental v0.3.14

Free - Unstable - APWorld Only

[client](<https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)

# Warning

This release may be bugged, because of the extent of the changes. Mostly, each genus needs to be gone through, but... that is time consuming.

Also i just realized that i completely forgot to make the new options do things on the client...

### Do I need to redownload the APWold?

Yes, but it might be bugged.

## APWorld
- Added a new option for choosing your genus, and
- Changed the way locations are added, so that genuses with different tech trees dont have impossible locations. - v0.3.12
- Fixed Location: Gantry Cranes not triggering - v0.3.13


## Client
- Fixed Power Bonus and Malus not having an effect. - v0.2.7
- Resource Bonus giving NaN amount for Crafting Materials (twice) - v0.2.8
- Fanaticism not working when no previous race selected. - v0.2.9
- Chat Message showing the wrong player (yourself) giving you items, and then duplicating the message - v0.2.11
- Unlocking (most) species, so they can be selected - v0.2.12
v0.3.14.title: Um... so its released but i forgor some things woops

v0.3.15.description:
# Evolve Incremental v0.3.15

Free - Unstable - APWorld Only

[client](<https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)

# Warning

This release may be bugged, because of the extent of the changes. Mostly, each genus needs to be gone through, but... that is time consuming.


### Do I need to redownload the APWold?

Yes, but it might be bugged.

## APWorld
- Added a new option for choosing your genus, and
- Changed the way locations are added, so that genuses with different tech trees dont have impossible locations; and
- Added new Options: Death Percent, Genus and Universe; and
- Removed Option: planet - v0.3.12
- Fixed Location: Gantry Cranes not triggering - v0.3.13


## Client
- Fixed Power Bonus and Malus not having an effect. - v0.2.7
- Resource Bonus giving NaN amount for Crafting Materials (twice) - v0.2.8
- Fanaticism not working when no previous race selected. - v0.2.9
- Chat Message showing the wrong player (yourself) giving you items, and then duplicating the message - v0.2.11
- Unlocking (most) species, so they can be selected - v0.2.12
- Added all the new options - v0.3.14
- Added a Stats page when you win because why not - v0.3.15

### Checklist
- Made sure the APWorld Loads - Yes
- Made sure the APWorld tests pass - Yes
- Made sure the Client works - Yes
- Made sure all APWorld features are added to the Client - Yes
